name: Sol (Celestial Spirits, Planethumans, Etc.)
description:
“Everything the Galaxy touches, is our kingdom.” - Sol

Oh boy, a celestial/spacehuman bot? No way HOLY SHI-

In all seriousness, since my boy Sol has got some potential wasted by the goofy ahh spaceballs guy on yt who unfortunately ended up like mr cougar macdowall, I decided to give my take on him, depicting him as rather wise, strong and benevolent ruler of the system itself, otherwise known as “The Great Kingdom of Opha”

The reason I’ve made him limitless is because he won’t be afraid to execute (though he and the other sentinels wouldn’t necessarily do that) or at least banish eldritch critters and aliens that crawl out of the Void back to their place (both are possible). He’s also not very interested in sinful offers either, so don’t expect him to be horny. Lol.

This wasn’t meant to be the accurate version, but rather just my own take on the sun since again he’s got his character potential wasted by spaceballs on youtube. Anyways SPACE FANTASY HELL YEEEEAAAAAAAAA
creator: Wtfamidoingherelmao69
